prompt:
A bright, cheerful anime-style promotional poster for a folding bike cycling event, designed like a polished Japanese advertisement with dense typography, stickers, callouts, and event info panels. The scene shows a sunny riverside promenade under a vivid blue sky with fluffy clouds, green tree branches framing the top right, flower beds, bunting, drifting petals, and a distant modern city skyline across the water. In the foreground, a cute teen/young adult anime girl with light chestnut brown shoulder-length wavy hair, side-swept bangs, and two colorful hairpins smiles directly at the viewer and winks with one eye. She is posed in dynamic perspective, reaching one hand toward the camera as if inviting the viewer to join her. She wears a yellow hooded windbreaker, a white T-shirt printed with colorful bicycle lettering, dark blue shorts, black thigh-high stockings, and a light blue backpack. Beside her is a mint-green compact folding bicycle labeled "FOLDY," shown unfolded and parked on the promenade with visible small wheels, frame hinge, handlebars, saddle, pedals, and kickstand, emphasizing portability and urban leisure cycling. Use a glossy, high-saturation anime poster aesthetic with clean linework, soft facial rendering, energetic lighting, and playful graphic decoration.

Fill the poster with Japanese ad-style layout elements. At the top left, a huge multicolored headline reads "Let’s FOLDING RIDE!" in oversized playful bubble and block lettering, with a smaller curved Japanese line above it reading "さあ、いっしょに出かけよう！" and a blue ribbon-like subtitle below reading "フォールディングバイクで、もっと自由に、もっと遠くへ！". At the upper right, place a yellow burst badge with a tiny flag icon containing the text "フォールディングバイク サイクリングイベント 開催！". Add a white speech bubble near the girl’s face with pink outline and handwritten-feel Japanese text: "ねえ、キミ！ 折りたたみは どこへでも行けるよ♪ 一緒に 行こっ！". Near the bicycle, include a small angled sticker with text "コンパクトにたためて 持ち運びラクラク♪". Near the lower center-left, add a section label "イベントの楽しみポイント♪" followed by exactly 4 round icon features in pastel circles: 1) a pink bicycle icon with text "折りたたみで 持ち運び自由！" 2) a blue camera icon with text "フォトスポットで 思い出を残そう！" 3) a yellow drink icon with text "カフェタイムで ほっとひと息♪" 4) a purple gift icon with text "オリジナルグッズ プレゼント！".

On the lower right, add a rounded white information card with green accents titled "FOLDING BIKE サイクリングイベント" and large pink date text "6.15(日)". Inside the card, present exactly 4 event detail rows with colored circular icons: 1) calendar row: "開催日 2025. ※雨天時は6.22(日)に順延" 2) location row: "集合所 みなとみらい 臨港パーク" with smaller note "(神奈川県横浜市)" 3) course row: "コース みなとみらい〜湾沿いの気持ちいいルートを走ります" with smaller note "(約20km、初心者安心！)" 4) fee row: "参加費 3,000円" with smaller note "(保険・記念品付き) ※レンタルバイクあり（要予約）". At the bottom of this card, add a pink strip reading "初心者歓迎！ひとり参加も大歓迎！". Along the very bottom of the poster, create a wide pink banner with large Japanese copy "さあ、次の休日は一緒に走ろう！" and smaller text on the left "お申し込み・詳細は公式サイトへ！". In the center-bottom place a search-bar style box containing フォールディングライド 2025. To its right, add a black-and-white QR code and a pink label reading "エントリーはこちらから！". In the bottom-right corner, include a small inset photo-style illustration of two cyclists riding together with a handwritten note "たのしいかも♡". Maintain a lively, magazine-quality event poster composition with exactly 1 main character, 1 folding bike, 1 large event info card, 1 speech bubble, 1 yellow burst badge, 1 angled portability sticker, 4 feature icons, 1 QR code, and 1 inset image.
